$meta.name: Viveka Design Tokens
$meta.description: Single source of truth for the Viveka brand. Every tool (Claude, Stitch, HTML, PDF, PPTX, Google Slides) consumes these values. Change a value here, regenerate the adapters, and the whole system stays in sync.
$meta.verification: navy #00008B and green #64C431 pixel-sampled from the logo artwork; palette (navy/green/#F2F2F4/white) and fonts (Avenir + Work Sans) confirmed against the official Logo Guideline (Nov 2023). Tokens beyond those four colors are deliberate extensions for readable docs/UI. See reference/brand-reference.md.

brand.name: Viveka
brand.wordmark: lowercase 'viveka', navy blue, with a small green dot below the letter 'i'

navy.role: PRIMARY. Headlines, slide/page titles, section titles, big stat numbers, table headers, thin borders, compact accent shapes.

green.role: ACCENT ONLY. Bullet dots, separator dots, dividers, icons, stat highlight lines, category tags. Never a headline color. Never a large background. Keep under ~10% of visual weight.

lightGray.role: SUPPORTING FILL. Card fills, table even-rows, callout fills, subtle dividers. Never the full canvas/background.

white.role: CANVAS. Mandatory background for every slide and every page.

ink.role: Body text on white. Near-black, softer than pure black.

muted.role: Captions, labels, dates, metadata, footnotes, helper text.

cardAlt.role: Alternate subtle card fill, slightly lighter than lightGray.

tintNavy.role: Very light navy tint for callout box fills.

font.comment: Two stacks. 'office' = native apps where Avenir is installed (PowerPoint on Mac). 'digital' = web/AI tools where Avenir is NOT available (Stitch, Claude, HTML, PDF, Google Slides). Both digital fonts are on Google Fonts.

display.use: Cover titles, slide/page titles, section titles, large stat numbers.

body.use: Body copy, bullets, captions, labels, table body.

wordDoc.note: The Word/.docx template uses Lexend for EVERY style (heading, body, caption, table, footer). Do not mix in Avenir or Work Sans there.

type.comment: Point sizes for print/office (PPTX, Word, PDF). For web, treat pt as px or scale via the 'scale' ratio.

space.comment: Generous whitespace is the primary layout tool. 4px base unit.

radius.comment: Subtle only. Rectangles, rounded rectangles, circles. No heavy rounding.

line.comment: Green accent lines are 3-5px. Navy borders are hairline-to-1pt.

elevation.comment: NO drop shadows, NO gradients, NO glows, NO texture overlays anywhere. Separation comes from borders, fills, and whitespace.

logo.default: navy wordmark + green dot, on white background
logo.placement: Top-left or bottom-right with generous clear space.
logo.rules: Never stretch, recolor, rotate, crop, or add effects. Avoid placing on green/gray/photo/patterned areas — prefer the navy-on-white version.
